themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Hezekiah's response 'Good is the word of the LORD' shows humble submission to deserved judgme...". Word-study detail reinforces "וֶאֱמֶ֖ת: and truth - stability; (figuratively) certainty, truth, trustworthiness".
